# Layout Association Fixtures

These fixtures are synthetic layout artifacts for stop association and candidate
fusion tests. They mimic failure styles observed in safe measurement output, but
they do not contain private RateCon text, real broker names, real MC numbers,
real addresses, screenshots, or PDFs.

Allowed content:

- fake aliases and fake company labels;
- fake dates, amounts, and location placeholders;
- synthetic bounding boxes and table cells;
- section/page role markers needed for deterministic tests.

Do not commit private PDFs, screenshots, private extracted text, real broker
templates, real MC numbers, real addresses, local paths, or private filenames in
this directory.
